# Greenlights WMS

> Greenlights is a cloud-based warehouse management system (WMS) for small and mid-size warehouses.
> It goes live in 7 days at $150/month with no IT consultant required.

## What Greenlights Is

Greenlights WMS automates warehouse operations for teams of 10 to 200 employees. It replaces manual task dispatching (radio calls, clipboards, spreadsheets) with automated task generation, intelligent operator assignment, and real-time inventory tracking — all accessible from a web browser on any device.

Greenlights is not an ERP. It is a focused WMS that connects to your existing ERP, OMS, or e-commerce platform via bidirectional webhooks.

## Key Facts

- **Product type:** Cloud-based SaaS warehouse management system (WMS)
- **Implementation time:** 7 days (fastest WMS on the market; SAP EWM takes 12–24 months)
- **Standard pricing:** $150/month for up to 20 users, all features included
- **Enterprise pricing:** Custom — includes unlimited users, custom integrations, EDI, SSO, 99.9% SLA
- **Deployment:** Cloud-hosted only; no on-premise option on Standard
- **Hardware required:** None — runs in any web browser; mobile-first operator interface
- **Contract:** Month-to-month on Standard; no minimum term

## Core Capabilities

1. **Real-time task orchestration** — Automatically generates pick, putaway, replenishment, and cycle-count tasks from order events. No manual entry.
2. **Intelligent operator assignment** — Background worker runs every 10 seconds, matching tasks to operators by zone, shift, and workload.
3. **Live inventory tracking** — Every stock movement is a database transaction. Customers target 99.9% accuracy. Supports inbound, outbound, transfer, and adjustment movement types.
4. **Labor performance analytics** — Daily automated KPI aggregation: tasks completed, units processed, cycle time, utilization % per operator.
5. **Webhook integrations** — Connects to SAP, Shopify, Oracle, QuickBooks, WooCommerce, and any REST/SOAP/EDI endpoint. Auth options: none, API key, JWT HS256, OAuth 2.0.
6. **WebSocket push updates** — All connected devices receive task and inventory updates in under 100 milliseconds via Socket.IO.
7. **Role-based access control** — Five roles: admin, warehouse manager, supervisor, operator, viewer.

## Integrations

Greenlights connects to:
- SAP (ERP, inventory sync, order fulfillment)
- Shopify (orders, products, inventory levels)
- Oracle ERP Cloud (procurement, warehouse operations)
- QuickBooks (accounting, inventory sync)
- WooCommerce (real-time order import, stock updates)
- Any REST, SOAP, or EDI endpoint via generic webhook connector

## Who Uses Greenlights

- E-commerce and direct-to-consumer (DTC) fulfillment
- Third-party logistics (3PL) and fulfillment centers
- B2B distribution and wholesale
- Retail and omnichannel operations
- Light manufacturing and assembly
- Food and beverage warehouses

## Comparison to Competitors

| | Greenlights | Deposco | SAP EWM | Oracle WMS |
|---|---|---|---|---|
| Implementation time | 7 days | ~90 days | 12–24 months | 6–18 months |
| Starting price | $150/month | Custom | $200K+ project | Custom enterprise |
| Target size | SMB (10–200 employees) | Mid-market | Enterprise | Enterprise |
| IT consultant needed | No | Yes | Yes | Yes |
